T1.description: High-conviction card: new batch contains actionable_watch or research_priority card with score >= threshold

T2.description: Fresh-count threshold: incoming batch has >= N high-priority cards regardless of individual score

T3.description: Last-chance aging trigger — REMOVED in run_033
T3.removal_reason: poll_45min fallback covers the last-chance use case; T3 added 0.8 reviews/day with zero reduction in missed_critical

S1.description: No actionable signal: suppress if no fresh/active/aging cards in deck

S2.description: Digest-collapsed noise: suppress if all fresh cards are low-priority and already collapsed into a family digest

S3.description: Rate-limit: minimum gap between consecutive push events

fallback_poll.description: Force a review if no push has fired in the preceding 45 minutes
fallback_poll.rationale: Safety net for quiet markets and last-chance coverage; replaces T3 trigger

family_collapse.description: Collapse multi-asset duplicates of the same (branch, grammar_family) into a single digest entry. Validated: 76% item reduction in run_027.

archive_policy.description: Cards archived at 5x HL (200 min for HL=40). Resurface as fresh clone if same (branch, family) recurs within 120 min. Hard-delete at 8h (480 min).

half_life_defaults.note: From run_014 calibration table. Recalibrate if stale_rate > 0.15 at poll_45min check.

notes: This config is the canonical production-shadow default as of run034.
Do NOT change T1.score_threshold or T2.fresh_count_threshold without a comparative shadow run.
The positioning_unwind x HYPE pair may need pair-level suppression after 2+ days of real data. See known_limits.md.
